ModDescription: Summons, guaranteed, maxed, and un-throttled. Three toggles in Configure Mod: (1) GUARANTEED DROPS - every quest/source that can drop a summon always does (vanilla 35/50/70% chances become 100%). (2) MAX SKILL LEVELS - skills on dropped summons always roll at the top of their level range (vanilla makes the top level the rarest). (3) BOOST 5-STAR CHASE SKILLS (new) - every top-tier summon has one premium 'chase' skill in its passive pool held down to 8% (Berserker Echo on Lucilius, War Elemental on Goldslime/Lilith/Rolan, Spartan Echo on Beelzebub, Stout Heart on Behemoth, etc.); this raises that skill to a configurable share (default 40%), leaving the filler skills to split the rest. Restart the game after changing a setting - tables are generated from vanilla data at every launch; nothing on disk is modified. Built for Endless Ragnarok 2.0. Which summon drops from each source stays vanilla-random.
